title: Bernard Roizman, pioneering University of Chicago virologist, 1929–2026
summary_en: Roizman reshaped the field of virology through his work on the herpes simplex virus, laying the groundwork for efforts to develop vaccines and other therapies.
title_cn: 芝加哥大学先驱病毒学家伯纳德·罗伊兹曼（1929–2026）

title: How do AI 'judges' compare to human ones? It's complicated, says a UChicago scholar
summary_en: In annual Ryerson Lecture, Prof. Eric Posner examines AI's growing role in legal decision-making—and why human judgment still matters
title_cn: 人工智能“评审”与人类评审孰优孰劣？芝加哥大学学者称相关情况较为复杂
